gloss_en: Are you well? How are you doing today?
notes: labās greeting, ki dāyr (harrell1962 §greetings; PADIC-MOROCCAN attests dāyr); initial cluster ʕl-

sentence: اَلْجَوّ زْوِين الْيُوم وَالشَّمْش طَالْعَة بِكْرِي.
raw: الجو زوين اليوم والشمش طالعة بكري.
ipa: alˈʒaww ˈzwiːn alˈjuːm waʃˈʃamʃ ˈtˤɑːlʕa ˈbikriː
gloss_en: The weather is nice today and the sun rose early.
notes: zwīn 'nice' (harrell1962 s.v.); ج=/ʒ/ (heath2020); شمش Darija form with final š (harrell1962); bikri 'early'

sentence: مَا بْغِيتْش قَهْوَة، بْغِيت أَتَاي بِالنَّعْنَاع.
raw: ما بغيتش قهوة، بغيت أتاي بالنعناع.
ipa: ˈmaː ˈbɣiːtʃ ˈqahwa ˈbɣiːt ʔaˈtaːj binnaʕˈnaːʕ
gloss_en: I don't want coffee, I want tea with mint.
notes: circumfix negation ma-...-š (harrell1962 §negation); bɣīt 'I want'; atāy 'tea' (Darija); ق=/q/ urban (noamane2020)

sentence: شْرِيت تْلَاتَة كِيلُو مَاطِيشَة مِن السُّوق بِعَشْرَة دْرَاهِم.
raw: شريت تلاتة كيلو ماطيشة من السوق بعشرة دراهم.
ipa: ˈʃriːt ˈtlaːta ˈkiːluː mɑːˈtˤiːʃa ˈmin asˈsuːq biˈʕaʃra ˈdraːhim
gloss_en: I bought three kilos of tomatoes from the market for ten dirhams.
notes: maṭīša 'tomato' (Darija lexeme, harrell1962); ث→/t/ tlāta (heath2020: stop reflexes); initial clusters šr-/tl-/dr-

sentence: هَادْ الرَّاجِل خْدَّام بْزَّاف وْمَا كَيْگْلَسْش فِي الظُّهْر.
raw: هاد الراجل خدام بزاف وما كيگلسش في الظهر.
ipa: ˈhaːd arˈraːʒil ˈxddaːm ˈbzzaːf ˈwmaː kajɡˈlasʃ ˈfiː dˤˈdˤuhr
gloss_en: This man works a lot and doesn't sit down at noon.
notes: bzzāf 'a lot' (harrell1962); گ=/ɡ/ in kayglas (Darija g, heath2020); durative ka-/kay- (ennaji2004); ma-...-š

gloss_en: Go to the market and buy the bread, please.
notes: Darija imperatives sir/shri (harrell1962); heavy onset clusters from vowel syncope; ʕafak politeness tag
